display_information.name: Cadence
display_information.description: Your team's rhythm, kept — time, promises, and updates managed inside Slack.

agent_view.agent_description: Cadence keeps your team's rhythm inside Slack: books meetings and arranges leave coverage via MCP calendar tools, tracks promises, catches you up after time away, compiles cited status cards and release notes, and finds the right expert — grounded in context via the Real-Time Search API.

suggested_prompts.title: Find a meeting slot
suggested_prompts.message: Find 45 minutes for me, Priya and Marco this week

suggested_prompts.title: Cover my leave
suggested_prompts.message: I'm on leave Thursday and Friday — find cover for my meetings

suggested_prompts.title: Catch me up
suggested_prompts.message: What did I miss in the last 2 days?

suggested_prompts.title: Project status
suggested_prompts.message: What's the status of project Phoenix?

slash_commands.description: Cadence: meetings, leave cover, promises, catch-up, status & more
slash_commands.usage_hint: [find 30 minutes with Priya tomorrow | show open promises]
